title: Add custom platform logo to all pages

requirements.text: Save the uploaded logo image as a static asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` and use it as the platform logo across all pages: replace any existing text-only or placeholder logo in the Header component (`frontend/src/components/Header.tsx`) with an `` tag referencing `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png`, and also display it prominently on all three login pages (ClientLogin, MasterLogin, StaffLogin) above the login form heading.

quotes: A logo da plataforma pode ser essa

acceptanceCriteria: The logo image is served from `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png`
The Header component displays the logo image instead of a text-only brand mark
The ClientLogin page shows the logo above the login form heading
The MasterLogin page shows the logo above the login form heading
The StaffLogin page shows the logo above the login form heading
All existing functionality and styling remain intact

constraints: Do not alter any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths
Preserve all existing functionality, routing, and neon green aesthetic
nonGoals: Changing any color scheme or typography

edits: Recreate the uploaded green circuit-board diamond logo on a transparent background instead of black (luid-logo.dim_256x256.png)
